subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us and a Tablet from Our presence unto those who dwell upon the earth, and unto her who desireth to make mention of her compassionate Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا و لوح من عندنا لمن علی الارض و لامه ارادت ذکر ربها المشفق
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
